IsX6dbk%2FONTpCTDXDE%3D","user_id":"2326983672594935","user_name":"魏江的甜心黑桃"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2326983672594935","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1727572878,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"活动专属","bg_color":"#E5FAF9","can_worn":false,"id":18,"name":"2024年度报告","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ccdc75f1db2f2539675b6d6e4b8bc26e","sticker_type":2,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/ccdc75f1db2f2539675b6d6e4b8bc26e"}},"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7113910890528771086","book_info":{"abstract":"平行世界，规则怪谈降临，每个国家随机出一名选手，选手死亡怪谈降临本国，选手通关才能消除怪谈，林枫很荣幸中奖，代表龙国参加规则怪谈。
第一个怪谈是妈妈的纸条。
妈妈已经无法回来了，你记得三天之后去外婆家。
1.你最好在晚上9点到11点出门，不在其他时间段出门。
2.出门的时候不要抬头，记得要一直看自己的脚。
3.在家里无论听到谁敲门都不要开门。
5.晚上出门不要跟任何人说话，可以把娃娃带在身上。
6.如果敲门声持续超过一分钟，请把家里蓝色的符纸贴在门上。

ecommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319534898416C7B56961BBCB5B2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读51分钟后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":16,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3074,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":17189},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7131218906857440000","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"一口气看完目前为止的所有章节，怎么说呢，虽然有些情节上处理的不是很好，比如情亲怪谈的父女和解那里，旅馆那里其实可以在展开说说，比如经理的尸骨被找到然后再去往生门。观感应该会好上不少。
  总体来说还是很精彩的，规则怪谈就是各种规则相互交错，相互覆盖，又彼此矛盾。这一点看的还是很上头的。我感觉比较精彩的有亲情怪谈的结局部分，旅馆怪谈的开始部分，夜路怪谈的阿呆，酒馆怪谈的家庭规则部分，动物园就不说了，看的最为爽快。而且结局也挺让人感动的。相亲怪谈就有点一般了，但瑕不掩瑜。精神病院还在更新，就不评价了。
  总之，这本书文笔还算不错，有泪点，有笑点。期待后续的更新。","text_exts":[{"e":109,"s":105,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742668281BBCB5B2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227131218906857440000%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113910890528771086%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":195,"s":192,"text":"动物园","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%8A%A8%E7%89%A9%E5%9B%AD&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742668281BBCB5B2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227131218906857440000%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113910890528771086%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%8A%A8%E7%89%A9%E5%9B%AD%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":239,"s":236,"text":"精神病","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E7%B2%BE%E7%A5%9E%E7%97%85&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742668281BBCB5B2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227131218906857440000%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113910890528771086%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E7%B2%BE%E7%A5%9E%E7%97%85%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1660366348,"group_id":"7113910890528771086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"诶嘿","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxO 第一个怪谈是妈妈的纸条。
妈妈已经无法回来了，你记得三天之后去外婆家。
1.你最好在晚上9点到11点出门，不在其他时间段出门。
2.出门的时候不要抬头，记得要一直看自己的脚。

recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032319534898416C7B56961BBCB5B2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读4小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":24,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":13274,"reply_count":2,"show_pv":19421},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1660366398,"author_reply_time":1660366459,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7127560015304950560","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"这本书是我为数不多看的下去的规则怪谈小说，我认为系统对猪脚的帮助不大，大部分都是猪脚靠自己找出错的规则，而且超级好看，就是有点短了，希望作者能每天多更一点。","text_exts":[{"e":18,"s":14,"text":"规则怪谈","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742668281BBCB5B2%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227127560015304950560%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227113910890528771086%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E8%A7%84%E5%88%99%E6%80%AA%E8%B0%88%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1659514486,"group_id":"7113910890528771086","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"我们IKUN不惹事，也不怕事","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny67nYgoYSqYtcOSCA/MHtNj7JhEMRH4ny2P6uHLHxBV","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/49726e2afa9d4a968c3bf7b1f9358168~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776788501&x-signature=vvgmytqGAHtXhwZUirBs%2B2v7AV4%3D","user_id":"4297366202498484","user_name":"iKUN副主"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4297366202498484","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7113910890528771086","book_info":{"abstract":"平行世界，规则怪谈降临，每个国家随机出一名选手，选手死亡怪谈降临本国，选手通关才能消除怪谈，林枫很荣幸中奖，代表龙国参加规则怪谈。
第一个怪谈是妈妈的纸条。
妈妈已经无法回来了，你记得三天之后去外婆家。
1.你最好在晚上9点到11点出门，不在其他时间段出门。
2.出门的时候不要抬头，记得要一直看自己的脚。
3.在家里无论听到谁敲门都不要开门。
5.晚上出门不要跟任何人说话，可以把娃娃带在身上。
6.如果敲门声持续超过一分钟，请把家里蓝色的符纸贴在门上。
